description: Letter fragment. In Judaeo-Arabic. Addressed to [...] Abū ʿImrān. Mentions the intercalation of the calendar and something the sender intended to do before he fell sick. He asks for a favor. This letter is stuck to an unrelated fragment (see separate record).
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
